  -n, --namespace       Base name of namespace in which generated code should be

  -d, --dir             This parameter indicates that input is not file but
                        directory.

  -e, --excludeTests    (Default: false) This parameter indicates that client
                        Specflow tests should be generated.

  -o, --output          Path to the output directory in which generated code
                        should be placed.
